metadata.description: Ensures text and interactive elements have sufficient contrast ratio (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text) against their background.

examples.message: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
examples.fixSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.11 (foreground color: #727780, background color: #f3f5f7, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
